name: kinematics-1d
invariants: output.ok === false || ['v0','v','a','t','x'].every(function(k){ var val = output.result.solved[k]; return val == null || Number.isFinite(val); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (dispatch key 'physics.kinematics-1d'; 3-arg handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, params)). Deterministic pure compute: solves the missing one(s) of {v0,v,a,t,x} from the standard 4 SUVAT equations. Drives PhysicsActionPanel.actKin + PhysicsWorkbench.KinematicsTab; component renders result.solved.{v0,v,a,t,x} + result.equations.join(' · '). Validation: <3 finite inputs → ok:false. POISON fail-CLOSED: each input via Number(...) then filtered by Number.isFinite, so '1e999'/'Infinity'/'NaN' drop out (never solve to a non-finite value). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/physics-lens-macros.test.js.
